tools.name: run
tools.description: Convert pandas Python code to PySpark equivalents

input_path.description: Path to Python file or folder containing pandas code

output_path.description: Folder for converted code and reports

path_mapping.description: Map old mount paths to new: {'/mnt/old': '/mnt/new'}

enable_spark_testing.description: Enable side-by-side testing with PySpark (if available)

auto_consolidate.description: Automatically consolidate converted files into converted_pyspark_files/ folder

summary.description: Conversion report with operations, changes, and Spark status

output_files.description: Converted code(s), discovery report, conversion summary, consolidated folder

data.description: Metrics: operations_found, changes_made, conversion_confidence, consolidated_folder, consolidated_file_count

tools.name: consolidate
tools.description: Consolidate converted PySpark files into organized folders

output_path.description: Path to existing converter output folder

consolidate_mode.description: Consolidation mode: files_only (only .py), with_reports (.py + reports), clean_output (complete package)
